channel.title: Pearl of Great Price
channel.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
channel.itunes:summary: Personal feed for Eric Wilde — official chapter-by-chapter audio of the Pearl of Great Price, streamed from the Church's CDN. Audio © Intellectual Reserve, Inc.; for personal study.
channel.description: Chapter-by-chapter audio of the Pearl of Great Price, from the official Church CDN. Personal use only.

item.title: Title
item.description: Pearl of Great Price — Title. Read aloud from the official audio recording of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
item.itunes:subtitle: Pearl of Great Price
item.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
